```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
```

```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

service="${1:?usage: $0 service-name}"

sudo systemctl restart "$service"

if systemctl is-active --quiet "$service"; then
 echo "OK: $service is active"
else
 echo "FAIL: $service is not active" >&2
 systemctl status "$service" --no-pager || true
 exit 1
fi
```
